chapter_voice_summary: BG 2.2's engineering layer matches the chapter thesis voice exactly — didactic, corrective, slightly stern. The line 'The diagnosis precedes the comfort. The comfort comes later, in 2.11. Right now, the senior engineer is naming what they see, sharply, because the moment requires it' is precisely the senior-engineer-who-has-stopped-explaining-gently voice the chapter thesis demands. Not cruel — clear. Not sarcastic — direct. The verse explicitly forecloses the softening move ('the falsifiability... fails if a reader uses it to justify being harsh with a junior') which keeps the voice from sliding into bullying. This is the sharpest doctrinal voice the chapter has yet shown, exactly where it should appear (the chapter's first Krishna-uvāca line).
